summary: Implemented the Version 3 Most Innovative Routing System demo slice with deterministic Work Jurisdiction routing, batch input/output, Fireworks-compatible provider enforcement, demo-only Ollama provider boundary, public JSON docs, and updated validation.
commands_run: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m amd_hackathon_app.cli run-scenario --scenario classification-basic --provider mock --run-dir /tmp/amd-hackathon-v3-runs

environment_observations.legacy_pod: pod_amd_hackerthon_app exists and was Exited during inspection
environment_observations.legacy_pod_policy: preserved; not deleted, reset, pruned, started, or reused

unresolved_items: Verify Fireworks execution when FIREWORKS_API_KEY, FIREWORKS_BASE_URL, and ALLOWED_MODELS are available.
Populate benchmark-derived eligibility data before Version 4 final scoring.
Use Ollama local demo path only if the operator deliberately starts qwen2.5-coder:3b for demo/development.
